A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Did Devamrta Swami write something about KS era and deviations?

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2009-01-04 · 7 answers
I did not heard any explanation, regret or lesson learned and taught on his part. Please help me clear the fog in my mind.
user [154] · 2009-01-04
why dont you write to him at Devamrita.Swami at Pamho.net?
user [2] · 2009-01-04
maybe he wrote or said something already...
and I spare him some precious time...
user [154] · 2009-01-04
I am sure for a devotee of your caliber ...
even a swami should spare some precious time ...
user [265] · 2009-01-05
He never apologized for the awful things he did to the devotees in Europe in the early 80s. That I know for a fact from many different sources. Back then he was a pathological manipulator and a liar. I sincerely hope he has since reformed. I worked very closely with him for several years and got to know him quite well. In those days he was pretty much all show and very little substance. When he defected to New Vridavan he let behind a lot of very angry devotees.
user [154] · 2009-01-05
[quote][cite] Kula-pavana:[/cite]He never apologized for the awful things he did to the devotees in Europe in the early 80s. That I know for a fact from many different sources. Back then he was a pathological manipulator and a liar. I sincerely hope...[/quote] I have heard from Giri govardhan that he did apologized and that he did change, even I have not heard it anywhere else.
user [265] · 2009-01-05
[quote][cite] ccd:[/cite][quote][cite] Kula-pavana:[/cite]He never apologized for the awful things he did to the devotees in Europe in the early 80s. That I know for a fact from many different sources. Back then he was a pathological manipulator and a liar. I sincerely hope...[/quote] I have heard from Giri govardhan that he did apologized and that he did change, even I have not heard it anywhere else.[/quote]

Than that is good news. I was hoping that he would eventually make some progress despite his previous offenses.
user [2] · 2009-01-05
..any document, link, audio or writting declarations? That would bury the insidious doubts of many.
